linting.notes: No custom golangci-lint config found; uses defaults. All linters passed with 0 issues during validation.

testing.run_command_direct: CGO_ENABLED=1 KUBEBUILDER_ASSETS="$(./bin/setup-envtest use 1.31.0 --bin-dir ./bin -p path)" go test ./pkg/... -race -count=1
env_vars: KUBEBUILDER_ASSETS=<path> (set by envtest for k8s testing)
testing.mock_patterns: Uses testify/assert and testify/require for assertions
testing.notes: Tests use envtest for Kubernetes controller testing. Test packages: api-translation (14 tests), anthropic (multiple tests), azureopenai (multiple tests), apikey_injection (multiple tests), model-provider-resolver (multiple tests). All tests passed during validation.

ci.notes: CI extracts Go version from go.mod (currently 1.25.0). Tests only run if source files changed (paths-filter). Both gating checks validated successfully.

build.notes: Multi-stage Dockerfile: builder stage (golang:1.25) compiles binary, deploy stage (distroless) runs it. Binary name: bbr. Supports PLATFORMS, GO_VERSION override.

conventions.test_naming: func TestXxx(t *testing.T) - standard Go test convention
conventions.import_style: Standard Go imports, grouped by stdlib/external/internal
conventions.notes: Tests co-located with source code in pkg/ subdirectories. Uses controller-runtime patterns for K8s resource testing.

lint_commands.notes: Installed golangci-lint v2.9.0, ran successfully with 0 issues

test_commands.notes: All tests passed: api-translation, anthropic, azureopenai, apikey_injection, model-provider-resolver packages
Combined tidy, vet, fmt, lint - all passed

env_vars: CGO_ENABLED=1 (set by make test-unit for race detection)
container_recipe.notes: Container setup is straightforward. make and git already present in golang:1.25 image. envtest downloads Kubernetes test binaries to ./bin/ on first run.

results.notes: All test packages passed. Total 5 test packages with tests, 4 packages with no test files (expected)

results.output_snippet:
find . -name go.mod -execdir sh -c 'go mod tidy' \;
go vet ./...
go fmt ./...
/app/bin/golangci-lint run --timeout 5m
0 issues.
results.notes: Full verify passed: tidy, vet, fmt, lint all clean

validation.summary: install OK, lint OK (0 issues), test OK (5 packages, all passed), verify OK

notes: Well-structured Go project with comprehensive test coverage. All CI checks validated successfully. No external infrastructure required for testing (uses envtest for K8s simulation). Clear Makefile targets. Ready for automated patch validation.
